title: T.H.E. VAN - 211info
text: OREGON SOCIAL LEARNING CENTER T.H.E. VAN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mental health and substance use disorder counseling and screening. Services are provided through a mobile van. 10 Shelton McMurphey Boulevard Eugene, OR 974015414 Eligibility: Ages 16-24 Hours: Wednesday/Friday 11am-4pm: Hosea Youth Center, 834 Monroe Street, Eugene, OR 97402 (541) 485-2711 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 485-2711 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call to make an appointment FEES: None. Insurance is not required, services may be billed for participants enrolled in OHP. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lane County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus stop within 2 blocks Services: Individual Counseling * At Risk Youth Mental Health Evaluation * At Risk Youth Substance Use Disorder Counseling * At Risk Youth Substance Use Disorder Referrals * At Risk Youth Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADOLESCENT AND FAMILY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON SOCIAL LEARNING CENTER
